skills.name: Daily News Briefing
skills.description: Sends top 5 headlines to your channel every morning at 8am. Stay on top of what matters without opening a browser.
skills.author: Kova Official

skills.name: Weather Brief
skills.description: Daily weather update for your city before you start work. Clean one-line summary every morning.
skills.author: Kova Official

skills.name: Crypto Price Alert
skills.description: Monitor Bitcoin, ETH, or any token. Get alerted when price crosses your threshold. No more staring at charts.
skills.author: Kova Official

skills.name: GitHub Activity Digest
skills.description: Daily summary of your repos — open PRs, new issues, recent commits. Stay on top of your projects.
skills.author: Kova Official

skills.name: Weekly Summary
skills.description: Every Friday, get a structured summary of your week — tasks completed, conversations had, key decisions made.
skills.author: Kova Official

skills.name: Smart Reminders
skills.description: Set reminders via chat. Just say 'remind me to call client at 3pm' and it handles the rest.
skills.author: Kova Official

skills.name: Meeting Summary
skills.description: Paste any meeting transcript and get a clean structured summary — decisions, action items, key points.
skills.author: Kova Official

skills.name: Price Drop Alert
skills.description: Monitor any product URL for price drops. Set your target price, get notified when it drops.
skills.author: Kova Official

skills.name: Social Post Scheduler
skills.description: Draft and schedule posts for Telegram and Discord. Queue content in advance and post on time.
skills.author: Kova Official

skills.name: Email Monitor
skills.description: Watch your Gmail for emails matching keywords or senders. Get instant alerts on your connected channel.
skills.author: Kova Official
